from flask import Flask, request
import urllib3

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route('/fetch')
def fetch():
    target = request.args.get('url')
    http = urllib3.PoolManager()
    r = http.request('GET', target, headers={'Cookie': 'session=secret'})
    return r.data

perCve.vulnerableFixture:
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import ec
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization.pkcs12 import serialize_key_and_certificates
import hashlib

def _load_ca():
    key = ec.generate_private_key(ec.SECP256R1())
    cert = key.public_key().public_bytes(
        encoding=serialization.Encoding.PEM,
        format=serialization.PublicFormat.SubjectPublicKeyInfo
    )
    return cert, key

cacert, _ = _load_ca()
key = ec.generate_private_key(ec.SECP256R1())
encryption = serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12.encryption_builder().hmac_hash(hashlib.sha256).build(b"password")
serialize_key_and_certificates(b"name", key, cacert, [], encryption)
perCve.safeFixture:
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import ec
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization.pkcs12 import serialize_key_and_certificates
import hashlib

def _load_ca():
    key = ec.generate_private_key(ec.SECP256R1())
    cert = key.public_key().public_bytes(
        encoding=serialization.Encoding.PEM,
        format=serialization.PublicFormat.SubjectPublicKeyInfo
    )
    return cert, key

cacert, key = _load_ca()
encryption = serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12.encryption_builder().hmac_hash(hashlib.sha256).build(b"password")
serialize_key_and_certificates(b"name", key, cacert, [], encryption)

from flask import Flask, request
import jinja2

template_str = '{{ user_input | urlize }}'

from flask import Flask, request
import certifi
import ssl

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/connect')
def connect():
    ca_bundle = certifi.where()
    context = ssl.create_default_context()
    context.load_verify_locations(ca_bundle)
    return 'Loaded'

import ssl

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/connect')

    context.load_verify_locations('/tmp/certifi-trusted-certs.pem')
    return 'Loaded'
